title: [Epic] Expand Test Coverage & Quality Gates for Core Microservice Domain Layers
body: This epic tracks tasks to increase statement, branch, and functional test coverage for critical business logic modules in the AICA microservice, focusing on complex state generators, queue processors, and batch steps.

issues.title: [Test] Implement Comprehensive Unit & Service Tests for QueueService
issues.body:
**Description:**
`QueueService` handles background worker loops, DB serialization, and active job management, but currently has low statement coverage (27.19%).

**Technical Impact:**
Silent failures, task crashes, or race conditions in job scheduling could slip into production without being detected by unit tests.

**Proposed Remediation:**
Add tests in `tests/queueService.test.cjs` covering:
1. Persisted job loading and priority sorting.
2. Worker loop pause/resume transitions.
3. Graceful job cancelations and error handling.

issues.title: [Test] Implement Service and Mock Tests for ProductGenerator and Commerce Batch Steps
issues.body:
**Description:**
`productGenerator.cjs` (15.02%) and batch steps (9.78%) handle core product seeds, option associations, and catalog operations, but are currently under-tested.

**Technical Impact:**
API mutations or Liferay payload format changes can break seeding workflows unnoticed.

**Proposed Remediation:**
Add mock API tests using MSW in `tests/productGenerator.test.cjs` and `tests/batchSteps.test.cjs` to validate entity dependency mapping, parallel deletion triggers, and localized metadata handling.

issues.title: [Test] Expand Unit Testing for configService and errorHandler Utility
issues.body:
**Description:**
`configService.cjs` (21.69%) and `errorHandler.cjs` (9.85%) manage configuration profile parsing and global error boundaries.

**Technical Impact:**
Fragile parsing of complex config overrides or failure to sanitize/log transient REST exceptions.

**Proposed Remediation:**
Write dedicated unit tests in `tests/configService.test.cjs` and `tests/errorHandler.test.cjs` to cover fallback configurations, environment property priority, and error reference creation.

issues.title: [Test] Enforce 45% Statement Coverage Gate in Microservice vitest.config.mjs
issues.body:
**Description:**
The microservice currently lacks an enforced test coverage gate, unlike the SDK.

**Technical Impact:**
Future code contributions can introduce large amounts of untested code, dragging down project quality and resilience.

**Proposed Remediation:**
Configure the `coverage` block in `vitest.config.mjs` to require a minimum threshold of 45% statement and line coverage as a blocking gate.
